prompt: The FIRST attached image is a wood-carved corner bracket: an L-shaped ornament made of interlocking squared-spiral fret hooks that fill the inside of two right-angle moulding rails, arranged as a diagonal staircase densest at the corner. Reproduce THIS EXACT corner bracket design and layout faithfully - same L shape, same interlocking squared-spiral hooks, same staircase arrangement, oriented for the TOP-LEFT corner of a frame (the right angle at upper-left, the fret filling down and to the right). Render it as a flat hand-tinted chromolithograph engraving in the style of the SECOND attached image (the voucher): solid dark ochre-brown line work, flat, no 3D, no photorealism, no wood texture, no lighting or shadow - just clean engraved lines like a printed border ornament. FRAMING: the entire bracket fully inside the frame with generous empty margin on all sides; nothing cut off. GROUND: fully transparent background, nothing else; no extra text, no color fill, no shadow.
